Sentences: Ik spreke Fresisk and thu sprikst Saxisk bi tha merke.
Thi asega seth thet riucht and tha fria Fresena herath.
Gister sprak thi skelta mith tha liudum umbe thene tol.
Morgen skil thiu boda thet bref to Liowerd bringa.
Jef thi skipman thene wind finde, sa skolde hi over thia Ee fara.
Ik ne habbe naet thene penning, ac ik habbe gode triuwe.
Thet bref werth eskriwen fan tha klerke in tha huse.
Tha bern weron blide, hwand thiu sunne sken over thet land.
Wi habbath tha worda ehorad and skilon hia wel halda.
Hwersa thi mon kume to tha thinge, sa mote hi sines eides gedenka.
Thi gast seith: 'Godne dei,' and thiu husfrouwe antwurth: 'Wes welkom.'
Ik fregi thi: 'Farst thu to tha merke?' and thu seist: 'Ik far nu.'
'Hwet socht thu?' queth thi knapa, 'Ik sochte min broder,' queth thiu magad.
Thi skipman hropth: 'Hald thet seil,' and his fere deth hit rad.
'Ne bist thu moede?' seith thiu moder, and thet bern seith: 'Na, ik wille spila.'
Wi sitta bi tha fiure and sprekath umbe weder and wega.
Thi klerk seith sachte: 'Bring mi thet sechel,' and thi feint bringt hit.
Thiu olde wif fregath nijs, and thi buer telth hire fan tha merke.
'Kom hider,' seith thi lera, 'hwand thiu boc is open.'
Tha twene friond spreka lange, til nacht fell over tha terp.
Thi klerk les in Latin 'pax' and segt hit thana in Fresisk.
Bi tha Hansa-merke mengath tha kopliud Fresisk, Saxisk, and Danske word.
Thiu nunne skriuwt 'amen' efter thet Fresiske gebed.
Thi bodel herath 'geld' fan tha Hollandere and segt 'jeld' to tha Frisa.
In Liowerd spreka hia Fresisk to huse and Latin to tha prebenda.
Thi jonge leornth thet word 'mare' in Latin and 'mere' in Fresisk.
Tha skipljud ropath in Saxisk to tha gastum, ac hia wendath eft to Fresisk.
Thi prest biginth mith Latin song and endath mith Fresisk lare.
Thiu magad seith 'ja' to tha Dutsche gast and 'je' to hire moder.
Tha scriba notath nomina in Latin, ac tha witnesse sprekath Fresisk.

Sentences: Tha klerkar settath tha namon, tha dagon, and tha getuigon in en bref.
Frihals is betera than goldene ketene.
Sa thet wetter rint to tha see, sa gath word to worde.
Ne sel mon thene fisk dela er hi fangen is.
Thi ther twa heren thionath, mist sin eigen hus.
Ald riucht heth lang skad and sterke wortla.
Tha honda bitat naet al, ther lude bellath.
Hwa ther wind sawth, hi rispth storm.
Beter is ene sote freond than tiuge wise rade.
Ther thiu hand gefth, ther wexe thiu triuwe.
Ner seil ner roder helpath, jef thi skipman sliepth.
Hwa halt thet riucht? Thi asega halt hit bi tha thinge.
Hwer leit Liowerd? Liowerd leit in Westerlauwerska Freslande.
Hwanne kumath tha skipljud? Hia kumath efter middei bi flode.
Hwi ne kam thi bodel? Hwand thi wech was wetter and swar.
Hwet kostath thet salt? Hit kostath thri penningar.
Hwa skriuwt thet bref? Thi klerk skriuwt hit for tha skelta.
Mei ik fara over thia Ee? Thu meist fara, jef thi wind god is.
Hwelk getuige sprak erest? Thi olde mon sprak erest.
Hwerfore is thi merk sluten? Hwand thiu nacht is neah.
Hwet is frihals? Frihals is fridom and eigen hals.
Bring thet bref to tha skelta er none.
Hald thina triuwe and ne swik naet thine freond.
Spreke lude, sa tha liud hera thin word.
Skriuw tha namon klara in thet boc.
Far sachte over thia Ee and wachtia thene wind.
Set thet sechel uppa thiu tafel and sluta tha kiste.
Ne nim thene penning buta witnesse.
Lera tha bern tha stafas and tha worda.
Help tha wif bi tha brege and bring hire water.
Gedenk thines eides, hwanne thu stondest bi tha thinge.
